title: Run history and artifact viewer
objective: Implement dashboard-facing data parsing and UI components for run history, run status, and artifact listing.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Parse .harness/runs/<run-id>/run-result.json and list runs by status, task id, adapter, duration, and timestamp.
Display artifact links or file names for patch.diff, summary.md, test-report.json, screenshots, and arbitrary artifact files.
Provide empty, loading, and error states for missing run directories or malformed JSON.
Add fixtures with at least one successful run and one failed run.
Add unit-level parser tests or smoke fixtures that can run without external services.

expectedArtifacts: tests or fixtures when behavior changes
updated documentation if user-facing behavior changes
koObjective: 실행 이력과 artifact를 UI/CLI에서 확인할 수 있게 한다.

koGuide.요약: 이 작업은 Codex가 Dev Container 안에서 자동 구현할 수 있도록 설계된 단계별 task packet입니다.
